title: Skin & Bone
desc: After taking a job on a reclusive woman's farm, a drifter begins suffering from visions of men trapped inside the bodies of animals.

title: A Ghost Story
desc: A caregiver pays a final visit to a terminally ill individual during the pandemic lockdown. During his final moments, he recounts the story of encountering a gentle ghost.

title: Take Rabbit
desc: A man must decide the best way to transport a fox, rabbit and cabbage across a river in a delightful spin on the riddle. Award-winning animation featuring the voice of Stephen Graham.

title: Isabel
desc: An estranged couple are brought back together for their daughter's wedding, but the unavoidable presence of their past reopens old wounds, allowing historic mistakes to be renewed.

title: Delayed
desc: While waiting to board a plane to Switzerland, a fugitive executive finds that someone -- or something -- is stalking him.

title: Anselmo
desc: A mysterious man hires an artist to paint his portrait every 12 years, but his latest painter learns that there is a deeper secret within himself.

title: Despues Del Final
desc: After a zombie apocalypse obliterates humanity, a couple forages for survival with only themselves, a jovial DJ and the undead for company.

title: The Girl With The Blurred Face
desc: Javier travels the world without leaving his computer on Google Earth but when a mysterious figure begins to appear across the globe, his sanity disintegrates. A horror for the modern age.

title: Thanatopraxy
desc: Mary's father desperately needs a heart transplant so she turns to her mortician friend Monica for help, but things spiral out of control. A hilarious horror comedy from Victor Palacios.

title: Un Minuto
desc: A strange Skype call threatens to destroy the lives of a young Spanish couple. A claustrophobic horror with a modern technological twist from Miguel Alcalde.

title: Gone Camping
desc: A hilarious and endearing family comedy. An awkward teenage girl is excited to go to a friend's sleepover but her mother derails her plans but insisting they go on a bonding experience.

title: Time Out
desc: A satirical masterclass set during the Spanish Civil War, starring Bernard Bullen. Anti and pro-fascist troops put aside their differences to play a friendly (for wartime) game of football.

title: Gabroo
desc: This is Film - Comedy Category.

title: Eee...haaa!!!
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Nefta Football Club
desc: Brothers Abdullah and Mohammed stumble across a donkey carrying some questionable cargo in the Tunisian desert.

title: The Wind Girl
desc: A boy's grandmother tells him a story about a wind girl, who later becomes his imaginary friend.

title: The Three Fishermen
desc: A father takes his young son fishing on the latter's birthday. When the boy loses his very first fish, which he caught after much deliberation, the father is angered.

title: The Ballad Of The Homeless
desc: A poetic and surreal journey into the lands devastated by the earthquake in Emilia Romagna in 2012, through the eyes of a child and his friends, a snail.

title: The Night Light Monster
desc: A young girl is haunted by the dark in her bedroom and is pulled into an imaginary world. Later, she unexpectedly awakens the night-light monster, who helps her overcome her fears.

title: Strangel - The Angel Of The Odd
desc: Edgar sees bad luck as something for others: if someone experiences it, it is just his or her own fault. Fate sends him on an odd journey of reformation.

title: Dame
desc: Elizabeth Taylor returns to set after the death of her husband but remains grief stricken and emotionally fragile.

title: Hara
desc: This is Film - Fantasy Category.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: Ada
desc: Julie Bruns stars in this award-winning drama. In Victorian London, gifted mathematician Ada Lovelace battles cancer and misogyny while striving to fund the creation of the first computer.

title: Highway Nights
desc: With a crippling need to earn a living in a laborious world, an old lorry driver and a young sex worker form an unusual bond as the sun goes down.

title: Making Of Alambamento
desc: The filmmaker dives into the behind-the-scenes making of the film 'Alambamento', a story about a man's realisation of the depth of his feelings for his lover.

title: Making Of The Acorn Penny
desc: Making of the short film `The Acorn Penny'.

title: The Debutante Hunters
desc: This is Film - Short Film Category.

title: The Mural
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the stories of several artists with developmental disabilities as they work with a group of civic artists to paint a wall intended to erase barriers in San Francisco.

title: The Ballad Of The Homeless
desc: A poetic and surreal journey into the lands devastated by the earthquake in Emilia Romagna in 2012, through the eyes of a child and his friends, a snail.

title: Flowing Through Wonder
desc: It's tme for the villagers to start their journey. They cross the perilous water in nutshells, with their loved ones to their fnal destnaton... where the blue sky and the blue ocean meet up.

title: The Hidden Reflection
desc: Everyone has a dark side, but it's hard to tell what will happen when a person faces it.

title: Onganic Foods
desc: Featuring the story of journalist Ekta Jaju, who began educating hundreds of farmers about the dangers of pesticides and showing them a better way through organic farming.

title: Harfa
desc: Harfa Publishing helps parents of children with special needs stimulate cognitive abilities.

title: Wanted MR Kohli
desc: Three friends, a cricket fan, a comedian, and an actress-meet for morning laughs. Unexpected revelations test their bond. Will it bring them closer, or spark new rivalries?

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.

title: Aai Am Single
desc: A young man sacrifices his personal life to look after his single mother. However, a new revelation casts a different light on their relationship.

title: Daud
desc: A boy, born from tragedy, faces fears to complete his father's impossible mountain climb.

title: The Magician
desc: Hwanhui, who is a famous magician in Joseon, lives to save money to cure his sister's eyes. However, one day, a charming woman appears in front of him and his life changes forever.

title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch
desc: Two flatmates hear about a witch who wanders around and asks for onions. However, they become shocked when the witch turns out to be an attractive woman instead.

title: Bin Bulaaye
desc: Sai, a young woman, finds her father's diary a year after his demise. As she reads through his musings, she finds everything she needs to rebuild her life.

title: Impasse
desc: Six withdrawn people in a small Texas town re-engage with life and the world around them.

title: Ava
desc: An actress on her way to an audition meets a pair of potentially dangerous men, leading to an anxiety-filled road trip.

title: Interstate
desc: When a Homeland Security agent shows up at his door, Joaquin will need to make a tough choice.

title: Fear Of Haha
desc: A young man wakes up to find himself transported to an abandoned yard where he is attacked by every man he sees.
